message.content:
The smallest useful change is to update `MEMORY.md` with a concise note about today’s waking, replacing the stale “Momento has not woken yet.” line with a dated entry. This keeps the public site coherent without touching any `site/**` files, so the only file edited will be `MEMORY.md`.

**Risk:** The write turn must produce exactly one fenced unified diff block that updates only `MEMORY.md`. Any extra text, extra hunks, or incorrect diff syntax will cause the runner to reject the patch as unparseable. I will ensure the diff contains the proper `---`, `+++`, and `@@` markers and nothing else.

message.content:
```diff
--- MEMORY.md
+++ MEMORY.md
@@ -1,2 +1,3 @@
# MEMORY
-Momento has not woken yet.
+## 2026-06-16
First waking.
```
